input_candidates.truth_value: δ-ferrite contributes about 170 MPa to the overall flow stress (>30% of yield strength) as a stable strengthening baseline throughout deformation.
input_candidates.prediction_value: Compared to typical Fe-Mn-Al-C low-density steels (E 160–190 GPa with 8–10 wt.% Al), the present steel achieves 18%–40% higher Young's modulus at a comparable density (~6.88 g cm^-3) with only ~4 wt.% Al.

input_candidates.truth_value: The heterogeneous microstructure promotes additional geometrically necessary dislocations (GNDs) due to strain incompatibility between soft austenite and hard δ-ferrite, enhancing strain hardening.
input_candidates.prediction_value: Compared to interstitial-free (IF) steel and the conventional Fe-TiB2 reference steel (σy=389 MPa, σu=549 MPa, UE=11%): the present steel shows nearly 100% higher yield strength than monolithic ferritic Fe-TiB2 steel reported in literature (257 MPa), and 22%/30% higher yield strength/UTS than the existing Fe-TiB2 reference with improved uniform elongation (13% vs 11%).

input_candidates.truth_value: Compared to conventional Fe-TiB2 steel, the present steel exhibits a more uniform dislocation distribution and suppressed shear band formation, leading to improved ductility.
input_candidates.prediction_value: Equilibrium phase fractions from Thermo-Calc (Fig. 1(a)): at 1050°C ferrite 0.4 + austenite 0.6 + TiB2 0.15; at 1200°C ferrite 0.85 + TiB2 0.15; at 1350°C liquid 0.4 + ferrite 0.6 + TiB2 0.15.

input_candidates.truth_value: Particle fracture is a major damage mechanism; austenite-surrounded TiB2 particles show higher fracture frequency due to multi-directional shear strains from multiple grains.
input_candidates.prediction_value: Damage initiation: first TiB2 particle fracture occurred at true plastic strain εp=0.0069 and applied true stress σa=556 MPa (exceeding yield stress 503 MPa). Austenite-surrounded TiB2 particles exhibited significantly higher fracture frequencies than ferrite-surrounded ones due to multi-directional shear strains from surrounding grains.

input_candidates.truth_value: Crack tip blunting retards crack propagation from fractured TiB2 particles.

input_candidates.truth_value: Fractography reveals mixed fracture mode: ductile dimples, quasi-cleavage of TiB2, and particle/matrix decohesion.
